message:
fix(random,linalg,ufunc): make zipf/logseries return Result; fix matrix power/expm/logm casts; use checked_div

- zipf/logseries now return Result rejecting invalid parameters
- Fix matrix_power and pcg_advance_128 redundant final squaring
- Replace try_into().unwrap_or() with direct casts in expm/logm
- Use checked_div for nan-reduction zero-division guards
- Add README note about CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 for rch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -853,6 +853,15 @@ Run all gates:
 scripts/e2e/run_ci_gate_topology.sh
 ```
 
+For manual direct `rch` workspace checks in this repo, prefer disabling Cargo
+incremental artifacts to avoid noisy remote artifact-retrieval races under
+`target/debug/incremental`:
+
+```bash
+CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
+CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
+```
+
 ---
 
 ## Conformance Pipeline
